## Change Type

- [ ] `fix`: patch release
- [ ] `feat`: minor release
- [ ] Breaking change: major release
- [ ] Non-release change (`docs`, `test`, `chore`, `ci`, `style`, or `refactor`)

## Verification

- [ ] A subagent ran the complete local test suite and reported all checks passing
- [ ] UI changes include Chromium smoke and accessibility coverage
- [ ] Visual changes were reviewed at relevant desktop and mobile sizes

Commands or additional checks:

```text

```

## Checklist

- [ ] This change comes from a feature branch, not `main`
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests, fixtures, and documentation are updated where needed
- [ ] Generated output and unrelated changes are excluded
- [ ] Breaking changes include migration guidance
